case_title: COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP VS. BRUCE KUCEJKO ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT KUCEJKO, BRUCE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP SERVED AUG-16-2014, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT KUCEJKO, BRUCE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUCEJKO, BRUCE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 835 O'FARRELL ST., #411, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP SERVED AUG-16-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KUCEJKO, BRUCE

NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT KUCEJKO, BRUCE

DECLARATION GEORGETTE BROWN FILED RE: LOST OR OTHERWISE UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUCEJKO, BRUCE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: -PREVIOUSLY RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF- $477.36 RENT, $510.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $987.36, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
